title: mespilus tiliifolia
intro: Mespilus tiliifolia, also known as Chinese hawthorn or tiliifolia hawthorn, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Mespilus tiliifolia include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Mespilus tiliifolia include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
